title: Malty Flaky Australian Knead Wrap
description: This malty flaky australian knead wrap features a rich and indulgent filling wrapped in crispy ti-leaf-wrap. Perfect as a breakfast or snack option.

ingredients.name: Vegan butter
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality vegan butter for the best flavor

ingredients.name: All-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use a high-protein flour for the best results

ingredients.name: Baking powder
ingredients.notes: make sure to use a fresh package of baking powder

ingredients.name: Whipping cream
ingredients.notes: chill the whipping cream in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before using

ingredients.name: Maple syrup
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality maple syrup for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Malt extract
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality malt extract for the best flavor

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt until well combined.
Add the vegan butter to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5-7 minutes, until the dough is smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and flatten the dough into a rectangle, about 1/4-inch thick.
Cut the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Place the balls of dough onto the prepared baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the dough is baking, prepare the filling by whipping the chilled whipping cream until stiff peaks form.
Add the maple syrup, malt extract, and vanilla extract to the whipped cream and mix until well combined.
Once the dough is done baking, split each piece in half lengthwise and fill with the whipped cream mixture.
Make sure to let the dough rest for 10 minutes before rolling it out to prevent it from shrinking during baking.
Use a sharp knife to cut the dough into clean, even pieces for the best results.
